glosses.yue: 持續時間; 時間長度
glosses.vi: thời lượng; độ dài thời gian

sentences.target: Die Dauer des Films interessiert mich.

translations.de: Die Dauer des Films interessiert mich.
translations.en: I'm curious about the movie's length.
translations.es: Quiero saber cuánto dura la película.
translations.fr: Je veux savoir combien dure le film.
translations.it: Voglio sapere quanto dura il film.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想知道这部电影有多长。
translations.pt: Quero saber quanto dura o filme.
translations.he: אני רוצה לדעת כמה זמן הסרט נמשך.
translations.tr: Filmin ne kadar sürdüğünü merak ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn biết phim dài bao lâu.
translations.nl: Ik wil weten hoe lang de film duurt.
translations.hu: Szeretném tudni, mennyi ideig tart a film.
translations.hi: मुझे जानना है कि फिल्म कितनी लंबी है।
translations.el: Θέλω να μάθω πόσο διαρκεί η ταινία.
translations.nb: Jeg vil vite hvor lenge filmen varer.
translations.id: Saya ingin tahu berapa lama filmnya.
translations.sv: Jag vill veta hur lång filmen är.
translations.ro: Vreau să știu cât durează filmul.
translations.cs: Chci vědět, jak dlouho trvá film.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne vide, hvor lang filmen er.
translations.fi: Haluan tietää, kuinka kauan elokuva kestää.
translations.ja: 映画がどれくらいの長さか知りたいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject NP 'Dauer'.
Feminine noun, singular; head of the subject phrase.
Definite article, genitive singular (masculine/neuter); determiner of the genitive noun 'Films' modifying 'Dauer'.
Masculine noun, genitive singular; 'of'-genitive complement to 'Dauer'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; predicates the clause and selects the accusative experiencer 'mich'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; object/experiencer of 'interessiert'.

sentences.target: Die Dauer der Fahrt steht online.

translations.de: Die Dauer der Fahrt steht online.
translations.es: La duración del viaje está en internet.
translations.fr: La durée du trajet est disponible en ligne.
translations.it: La durata del viaggio è disponibile online.
translations.zh-Hans: 行程时长在网上可以查到。
translations.yue: 行程所需時間喺網上有得睇。
translations.pt: A duração da viagem está disponível online.
translations.vi: Thời gian chuyến đi có trên mạng.
translations.hi: यात्रा की अवधि ऑनलाइन उपलब्ध है।
translations.pl: Czas trwania podróży jest dostępny online.
translations.el: Η διάρκεια της διαδρομής είναι διαθέσιμη στο διαδίκτυο.
translations.cs: Délka cesty je k dispozici online.
translations.ja: 所要時間はオンラインに載っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Feminine noun, singular; head of the subject.
Definite article, genitive singular feminine; determiner of 'Fahrt' as genitive modifier of 'Dauer'.
Feminine noun, genitive singular; genitive complement to 'Dauer'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive usage, with 'online' as an adverbial predicate-like modifier.
Adverb of manner/place; modifies 'steht' indicating availability/status.

sentences.target: Für die Dauer des Umbaus bleibe ich hier.
sentences.reading: /fyːɐ̯ diː ˈdaʊ̯ɐ dɛs ˈʊmbaʊ̯s ˈblaɪ̯bə ɪç hiːɐ̯/

translations.de: Für die Dauer des Umbaus bleibe ich hier.
translations.ipa: /fyːɐ̯ diː ˈdaʊ̯ɐ dɛs ˈʊmbaʊ̯s ˈblaɪ̯bə ɪç hiːɐ̯/
translations.en: I'll stay here for the duration of the remodel.
translations.es: Me quedaré aquí mientras dure la reforma.
translations.fr: Je reste ici pendant les travaux.
translations.it: Resto qui finché durano i lavori.
translations.zh-Hans: 装修期间我会待在这里。
translations.yue: 裝修期間我會留喺呢度。
translations.ru: На время ремонта я останусь здесь.
translations.pt: Vou ficar aqui durante a reforma.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ ở lại đây trong suốt thời gian sửa chữa.
translations.nl: Ik blijf hier tijdens de verbouwing.
translations.uk: На час ремонту я залишуся тут.
translations.hu: A felújítás ideje alatt itt maradok.
translations.hi: नवीनीकरण के दौरान मैं यहीं रहूँगा।
translations.el: Θα μείνω εδώ όσο κρατάει η ανακαίνιση.
translations.id: Saya akan tetap di sini selama renovasi.
translations.ro: Voi rămâne aici pe durata renovării.
translations.ja: リフォームの間はここにいます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing accusative; heads the fronted PP.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular (selected by 'für'); determiner of 'Dauer'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für' within the PP.
Definite article, genitive singular masculine; determiner of 'Umbaus' as genitive complement to 'Dauer'.
Masculine noun, genitive singular; genitive modifier specifying the type of duration.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; predicates the clause.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'bleibe'.
Adverb of place; modifies 'bleibe'.

sentences.target: Die Dauer der Pause war zu kurz.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈdaʊ̯ɐ deːɐ̯ ˈpaʊ̯zə vaːʁ tsuː kʊʁts/

translations.de: Die Dauer der Pause war zu kurz.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈdaʊ̯ɐ deːɐ̯ ˈpaʊ̯zə vaːʁ tsuː kʊʁts/
translations.it: La pausa è stata troppo breve.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Feminine noun, singular; head of the subject phrase.
Definite article, genitive singular feminine; determiner of 'Pause' as genitive complement to 'Dauer'.
Feminine noun, genitive singular; genitive modifier of 'Dauer'.
Finite auxiliary (copula), 3rd person singular preterite; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Degree adverb; intensifies 'kurz' as 'too short'.
Predicate adjective; complements the copula 'war'.
